summary: Iteration 88 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All requested fixes verified: 1) Heyo call buttons completely REMOVED from both StaffPortal.js and ProfessionalLeadsManagement.js, 2) Standard tel: calling is now the only option, 3) Staff Portal notification dropdown is mobile responsive with fixed positioning and close button, 4) Admin Leads bulk action bar has WhatsApp button and is mobile responsive with horizontal scrolling.
critical_code_review_comments: StaffPortal.js: Heyo completely removed - grep returns no results for 'heyo'
StaffPortal.js: Standard tel: calling at line 368-369 using window.location.href = `tel:${cleanPhone}`
StaffPortal.js: Notification dropdown (lines 555-600) has mobile responsive styling with fixed positioning, close button (sm:hidden), and overlay backdrop
ProfessionalLeadsManagement.js: Heyo completely removed - grep returns no results for 'heyo'
ProfessionalLeadsManagement.js: Standard tel: calling at lines 35-36 using window.location.href = `tel:${cleanPhone}`
ProfessionalLeadsManagement.js: Bulk action bar (lines 996-1082) has WhatsApp button at line 1012-1018 and horizontal scrolling with overflow-x-auto at line 1010
ProfessionalLeadsManagement.js: Bulk WhatsApp modal implemented at lines 2206-2332 with showBulkWhatsAppModal state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Heyo call functionality has been completely removed from both StaffPortal.js and ProfessionalLeadsManagement.js. Standard tel: calling is now the only option. Staff Portal notification dropdown is mobile responsive with fixed positioning, overlay backdrop, and close button. Admin Leads bulk action bar has WhatsApp button visible and is mobile responsive with horizontal scrolling.
